Localization.Description: The Discretionary Access Control List (DACL) of Active Directory objects was dumped using the Aced utility. Attackers use Aced to create reverse privilege escalation attack paths (starting from the targeted goal).

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} started the Aced tool from host {src.ip} to dump the DACLs of the following objects: {alert.context}
